hints.text: Bollards: **orange double reflector front / single white back** (only Czechia + Slovakia); rare blue/red variants
Special **extra-wide B-type guardrail** used only by Czechia & Slovakia
Wide round concrete poles, often attached in **pairs**; trident / upside-down-triangle poletops
Chevrons **white w/ red arrows**; temporary **red-and-white striped signposts** common
Stripy **gas/water poles** (snow-pole-like) often next to the road
**Hiking markers** (one colour strip between two white) common (also SK/PL/HU)
Prefab **panel apartment blocks** — well-maintained, vibrant colours/patterns; **diamond-tile roofs**
Gen3 antenna w/ **grey tape** on top (also HU/RO/BG); red, black & white Gen4 cars; rare Gen2 (Slovakia has none)
**Czech** distinct letters **Ř Ě Ů** (Slovak: Ľ Ô Ä Ŕ Ĺ); street = **ulice** (not ulica)
Bright **red street signs** (wall or post) + blue/red house-number signs; km markers have a **yellow outline, no middle line**
Black **bridge-end signs** with the road number on the left (Gen4)
Landscape = **rolling hills** + altitude changes, few tall mountains (Slovakia = more mountains + flat areas); grey/snowy winter Gen3
Road number **first digit 1–6 = region**; roads 7/8/9 all start in **Prague** heading N/NW
